Aelfric's Lives of Saints,
BEING
A Set of Sermons on Saints' Days formerly observed by the English Church,
EDITED FROM MANUSCRIPT JULIUS E. VII IN THE COTTONIAN COLLECTION, WITH VARIOUS READINGS FROM OTHER MANUSCRIPTS,
BY THE
REV. WALTER W. SKEAT, M.A.
Erlington and Bosworth Professor of Anglo-Saxon in the University of Cambridge..
LONDON:
PUBLISHED FOR THE EARLY ENGLISH TEXT SOCIETY,
BY N. TRÜBNER & CO., 57 AND 59 LUDGATE HILL.
M DCCC LXXXI.
76.
OXFORD:
BY E. PICKARD HALL, M.A., AND J. H. STACY,
PRINTERS TO THE UNIVERSITY.
